adc_acquisition_reg

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x1c
Source:
adc_acquisition_reg_definition.rdl

Description

Registers for interfacing with the ADC Acquisition Controller & DMA

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 CNTRL Control
0x04 STATUS Status
0x08 WRITE_HEAD Write Head
0x0C F0_START_ADDR Address Configuration
0x10 F0_END_ADDR Address Configuration
0x14 F1_START_ADDR Address Configuration
0x18 F1_END_ADDR Address Configuration
